sources: Australian Government Department of Health, Disability and Ageing — Average annual price changes in private health insurance premiums
CHOICE (Mar 2026) analysis of big-five insurers (Bupa, HCF, HBF, Medibank, NIB)
meta.notes: Tier-level increases are not published by DoH in a machine-readable file. Per-tier series for 2025–2026 is sourced from CHOICE's analysis of big-five insurer filings. Industry-average line is the DoH-approved weighted industry average. Where tier fields are null, the chart uses the industry average for that year (dashed segment).
